text: Reporter: Do you have an update on the UFO files? Trump: We are going to be releasing as much as we can in the near future… I think some of it’s going to be pretty interesting.
text_zh: 记者：关于UFO文件有什么最新消息吗？特朗普：我们将在不久的将来尽可能多地发布……我认为其中一些内容会非常有趣。

text: 📝 Майское перемирие 📝 Помощник Президента России Юрий Ушаков сообщил о произошедшем недавно телефонном разговоре между Владимиром Путиным и Дональдом Трампом , который длился около полутора часов. ➡️ По результатам звонка стало известно о готовности Кремля объявить перемирие ко Дню Победы . Предложение встретило одобрение со стороны Трампа . Оба лидера обменялись мнениями касательного недавнего покушения на президента США, обстановки на Ближнем Востоке, а также ударов ВСУ по гражданской инфраструктуре на территории России. ➡️ Со слов Ушакова , оба президента согласны в том, что ключевым камнем преткновения для установления долгосрочного мира на т.н. Украине является фигура де-факто президента Зеленского . Он должен «положительно» отреагировать на ранее обозначенные предложения. Вероятно, речь шла о договоренностях, достигнутых во время встречи в Анкоридже. 📌 В своем сообщении Ушаков конкретно подчеркивает, что Зеленский, которого финансируют европейцы с целью затягивания конфликта, не дает закончить боевые действия. И мнение президентов США и России на этот счет совпадает, хотя ранее Трамп неоднократно делал выпады в адрес российской стороны. Любопытно, попытаются ли теперь американцы склонить де-факто президента т.н. Украины к новому раунду переговоров и практическим результатам. Ведь после начала конфликта на Ближнем Востоке переговорный трек вокруг боев в зоне СВО встал на паузу. #Россия #США #Украина ✈️ RU | ✈️ EN | ✉️ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ ОК | ✉️ Дзен 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 📝 五月停火 📝 俄罗斯总统助理尤里·乌沙科夫通报了弗拉基米尔·普京与唐纳德·特朗普之间最近进行的一次通话，通话持续了约一个半小时。 ➡️ 通话结果显示，克里姆林宫准备宣布在胜利日期间停火。该提议得到了特朗普的支持。两位领导人就近期针对美国总统的暗杀企图、中东局势以及乌克兰武装部队对俄罗斯境内民用基础设施的袭击交换了意见。 ➡️ 据乌沙科夫称，两位总统一致认为，实现所谓乌克兰长期和平的关键症结在于事实上的总统泽连斯基。他必须对之前提出的建议做出“积极”回应。这很可能指的是在安克雷奇会晤期间达成的协议。 📌 乌沙科夫在消息中特别强调，由欧洲人资助以拖延冲突的泽连斯基阻碍了战斗行动的结束。美俄总统对此观点一致，尽管特朗普此前曾多次抨击俄方。令人好奇的是，美国人现在是否会试图说服所谓乌克兰的事实总统进行新一轮谈判并取得实际成果。毕竟，中东冲突爆发后，围绕特别军事行动区的战斗谈判进程已经暂停。 #俄罗斯 #美国 #乌克兰 ✈️ RU | ✈️ EN | ✉️ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ OK | ✉️ Dzen 💸 支持我们

text: Open Source Intel REPORT: The Pentagon is sending one of its aircraft carriers home from the Middle East. (I’m assuming thats the Ford) tweet
text_zh: 开源情报报告：五角大楼正在将其中一艘航空母舰从中东撤回。（我假设是福特号）推文

text: OSINTdefender The USS Gerald R. Ford (CVN-78) and her Carrier Strike Group, which have been deployed now for over 300 days, far surpassing the record for the longest aircraft carrier deployment since the Vietnam War, will depart from the Red Sea in the coming days to begin the journey back to her homeport at Naval Station Norfolk in Virginia, following last week’s arrival of the USS George H. W. Bush (CVN-77) in the Middle East near Iran, officials tell the Washington Post. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 官员告诉《华盛顿邮报》，杰拉尔德·R·福特号航空母舰（CVN-78）及其航母打击群已部署超过300天，远超自越南战争以来最长航母部署记录，将在未来几天离开红海，开始返回其位于弗吉尼亚州诺福克海军基地的母港。此前，乔治·H·W·布什号航空母舰（CVN-77）已于上周抵达伊朗附近的中东地区。推文

text: Open Source Intel Putin to Trump in a phone call: He foresees "extremely harmful consequences" if the U.S. and Israel attack Iran again. - TASS tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 普京在与特朗普的通话中表示：如果美国和以色列再次袭击伊朗，他预见会有“极其有害的后果”。- 塔斯社推文

text: Open Source Intel Channel 12 claims Trump told Netanyahu to hold off on hitting Hezbollah buildings. Netanyahu posted a video of the IDF blowing them up. With music. Netanyahu shares Israeli airstrike footage in Lebanon shortly after Channel 12 Claims. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049542368261447963/video/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 第12频道声称特朗普告诉内塔尼亚胡暂缓打击真主党的建筑物。内塔尼亚胡发布了一段以色列国防军炸毁这些建筑物的视频。还配了音乐。内塔尼亚胡在第12频道声称后不久分享了以色列在黎巴嫩的空袭画面。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049542368261447963/video/1 - 开源情报推文

text: OSINTdefender According to a release from the U.S. State Department, the U.S. will contribute $100 million to a $500 million G7 fund aimed repair the damage to the Chernobyl containment facility, following a Russian drone strike on the installation. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2049550567194640704/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 根据美国国务院发布的消息，继俄罗斯对切尔诺贝利核设施进行无人机袭击后，美国将向一个5亿美元的七国集团（G7）基金捐款1亿美元，旨在修复切尔诺贝利围堵设施的损坏。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2049550567194640704/photo/1 推文

text: Faytuks News The aircraft carrier USS Gerald R. Ford will depart the Middle East and begin the sail for home in the coming days, US officials say -WaPo https://twitter.com/Faytuks/status/2049550505567797474/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Faytuks新闻 美国官员称，杰拉尔德·R·福特号航空母舰将在未来几天离开中东并开始返航 -《华盛顿邮报》 https://twitter.com/Faytuks/status/2049550505567797474/photo/1 推文

text: U.S. Central Command Guided-missile destroyer USS Mason (DDG 87) sails regional waters within the U.S. Central Command area of responsibility. Mason, alongside other destroyers, is part of the George H.W. Bush Carrier Strike Group, one of three carrier strike groups currently operating in the Middle East. tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部 导弹驱逐舰梅森号（DDG 87）在美国中央司令部责任区内的区域水域航行。梅森号与其他驱逐舰一起，是乔治·H·W·布什号航母打击群的一部分，该打击群是目前在中东行动的三支航母打击群之一。推文

text: Open Source Intel Zelensky: Russians are absolutely crazy to attack nuclear stations. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049547368907890957/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 泽连斯基：俄罗斯人攻击核电站简直是疯了。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049547368907890957/video/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Status-6 (War & Military News) 📞 🇺🇸 🇷🇺 Russian President Putin and US President Trump held a phone call on Wednesday, the Kremlin informed. According to Moscow's readout: - Putin told Trump he was ready to declare a ceasefire for the period of Victory Day, and Trump supported this; - Putin expressed words of support to Trump in connection with the assassination attempt and strongly condemned the crime; - Putin told Trump that the goals of the so-called "Special Military Operation" will be achieved anyway, but Russia would prefer to do so through negotiations; - Putin told Trump about "purely terrorist methods" [employed by Ukrainian forces] for attacking civilian targets; - Trump told Putin that a deal to settle the Russia-Ukraine war is close; - Putin told Trump that he is expecting "extremely dire consequences" if the US and Israel resort to kinetic actions in the Middle East again; - Putin said that the option of a ground operation against Iran would be "completely unacceptable and dangerous." tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Status-6（战争与军事新闻） 📞 🇺🇸 🇷🇺 克里姆林宫通报，俄罗斯总统普京与美国总统特朗普周三进行了通话。根据莫斯科的通报：- 普京告诉特朗普，他准备宣布在胜利日期间停火，特朗普对此表示支持；- 普京就暗杀企图向特朗普表达了支持，并强烈谴责了这一罪行；- 普京告诉特朗普，所谓“特别军事行动”的目标无论如何都会实现，但俄罗斯更倾向于通过谈判实现；- 普京向特朗普讲述了[乌克兰军队]攻击民用目标的“纯粹恐怖主义手段”；- 特朗普告诉普京，解决俄乌战争的协议已接近达成；- 普京告诉特朗普，如果美国和以色列再次在中东采取军事行动，他预见会有“极其可怕的后果”；- 普京表示，对伊朗进行地面行动的选项是“完全不可接受且危险的”。推文

text: WarMonitor Well, that explains a few things. Putin has told Trump in a phone call that he foresees "extremely harmful consequences" if the US and Israel resort to attacking Iran again -TASS - Faytuks News tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 嗯，这解释了一些事情。普京在通话中告诉特朗普，如果美国和以色列再次袭击伊朗，他预见会有“极其有害的后果” - 塔斯社 - Faytuks新闻推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷U.S. Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff Caine emphasized that he strives to tell U.S. leaders what they need to hear, not what they want to hear. "My blueprint for this role is General George C. Marshall. His commitment to civilian control of the…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Department of War Comptroller Hurst estimates that Operation Epic Fury costed the government $25 billion so far. Rep. Smith: "Drag you into the conversation here. We have not yet received from the Pentagon the costs of the war. So just for the record, we'd like to get that as soon as possible. Certainly, the munitions expended, but also underreported is we've had a fair amount of equipment destroyed, including two C-130s with the rescue of our downed airmen. So do you have either A, a cost estimate coming to us anytime soon or B, a specific supplemental request?" Hurst: "Thank you for that question. So approximately at this day, we're spending about $25,000,000,000 on Operation Epic Fury. Most of that is ammunition. There's part of that is obviously O and M and equipment replacement. We will formulate a supplemental, through the White House that will come to Congress, once we have a full assessment of the cost of the conflict." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷美国参谋长联席会议主席凯恩强调，他努力告诉美国领导人他们需要听到的，而不是他们想听到的。“我担任这一角色的蓝图是乔治·C·马歇尔将军。他对文官控制的承诺……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国战争部审计长赫斯特估计，“史诗愤怒”行动迄今已花费政府250亿美元。史密斯众议员：“把你拉进谈话中。我们尚未收到五角大楼关于战争费用的报告。所以为了记录在案，我们希望尽快得到它。当然，包括消耗的弹药，但也被低估的是我们有相当多的装备被摧毁，包括在营救我们被击落的飞行员时损失的两架C-130。所以你是否有A，近期给我们的成本估算，或者B，具体的补充请求？”赫斯特：“感谢你的提问。截至目前，我们在‘史诗愤怒’行动上大约花费了250亿美元。其中大部分是弹药。当然，部分是运营与维护（O&M）和装备更换。一旦我们对冲突成本进行了全面评估，我们将通过白宫向国会制定一份补充请求。” @wfwitness

text: Trump meets with Artemis II Astronauts.
text_zh: 特朗普会见阿耳忒弥斯2号宇航员。

text: Six Iranian crew members from the Iranian-flagged container ship Touska have been freed following its seizure by the U.S., while 22 others remain in custody. Source: Tasnim
text_zh: 在伊朗籍集装箱船“Touska”号被美国扣押后，船上的6名伊朗船员已被释放，另有22人仍被拘留。来源：塔斯尼姆通讯社

text: 🇺🇸 Lies 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 谎言 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇷🇺 🇺🇸 Trump and Putin held a phone call, Putin's Aide Ushakov reported 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🇺🇸 特朗普与普京进行了通话，普京助理乌沙科夫报告 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Pete Hegseth: I know that there is no country on planet Earth that takes more measures to ensure that civilian harm or civilian casualties are minimized than the United States of America and this War Department. That is a fact.
text_zh: 皮特·赫格塞斯：我知道地球上没有哪个国家比美利坚合众国和这个战争部采取了更多的措施来确保将平民伤害或平民伤亡降至最低。这是一个事实。

text: The Fed leaves its interest rates unchanged.
text_zh: 美联储维持利率不变。

text: Q: Who are you beholden to, Trump or the Constitution? Hegseth: (Laughs)
text_zh: 问：你效忠于谁，特朗普还是宪法？赫格塞斯：（笑）

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷U.S. Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff Caine paid respects to U.S. personnel killed during his time as Chairman, specifically mentioning the 14 killed during Operation Epic Fury. "I would also like to express my deep gratitude for the 39 members…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff Caine emphasized that he strives to tell U.S. leaders what they need to hear, not what they want to hear. "My blueprint for this role is General George C. Marshall. His commitment to civilian control of the military and nonpartisan military remains a constant standard and something I bar from often. I strive daily to emulate his candor, delivering the facts to our leaders, and telling them always what they need to hear, not always what they wanna hear. And once a decision is made, executing it with absolute dedication, and that is the demand of our profession." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷美国参谋长联席会议主席凯恩向他在担任主席期间阵亡的美国人员表示敬意，特别提到了在‘史诗愤怒’行动中阵亡的14人。“我也想对我深表感谢的39名成员……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国参谋长联席会议主席凯恩强调，他努力告诉美国领导人他们需要听到的，而不是他们想听到的。“我担任这一角色的蓝图是乔治·C·马歇尔将军。他对文官控制军队和非党派军队的承诺仍然是一个不变的标准，也是我经常遵循的。我每天都努力效仿他的坦率，向我们的领导人传达事实，并始终告诉他们他们需要听到的，而不是他们想听到的。一旦做出决定，就以绝对的奉献精神执行它，这就是我们职业的要求。” @wfwitness

text: NEW: The USS Gerald R. Ford is expected to leave the Middle East in the coming days after a 10-month deployment for needed repairs. Source: WaPo
text_zh: 最新消息：杰拉尔德·R·福特号航空母舰（USS Gerald R. Ford）在部署10个月后，预计将在未来几天离开中东进行必要的维修。来源：华盛顿邮报

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ: The aircraft carrier USS Gerald R. Ford is expected to leave the Middle East in the coming days and begin its return home, removing significant U.S. firepower from the region as U.S.-Iran talks remain stalled. The Ford is one of three U.S. carriers in the region, alongside USS George H.W. Bush and USS Abraham Lincoln, which are operating in the Arabian Sea to enforce the blockade on vessels carrying oil or goods from Iranian ports. @wfwitnesss
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 华尔街日报：杰拉尔德·R·福特号航空母舰预计将在未来几天离开中东并开始返航，随着美伊谈判陷入僵局，此举将从该地区撤出重要的美国火力。福特号是美国在该地区的三艘航母之一，另外两艘是乔治·H·W·布什号（USS George H.W. Bush）和亚伯拉罕·林肯号（USS Abraham Lincoln），它们正在阿拉伯海执行任务，以封锁从伊朗港口运载石油或货物的船只。@wfwitnesss

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷U.S. Secretary of War Hegseth compared previous U.S. wars and with the ongoing Operation Epic Fury. "I remind you, two months in to a conflict, lest I remind you, and my generation understands how long we were in Iraq, how long we were in Afghanistan…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff Caine paid respects to U.S. personnel killed during his time as Chairman, specifically mentioning the 14 killed during Operation Epic Fury. "I would also like to express my deep gratitude for the 39 members of our joint force who've passed away during my time as the chairman, including 14 who've passed during Operation Epic Fury. As the secretary said, we are deeply grateful for each of them and their families, and their names will never be forgotten." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷美国战争部长赫格塞斯（Hegseth）将之前的美国战争与正在进行的‘史诗之怒’行动（Operation Epic Fury）进行了比较。‘我提醒你们，冲突才两个月，我提醒你们，我这一代人了解我们在伊拉克待了多久，在阿富汗待了多久……’” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国参谋长联席会议主席凯恩（Caine）向他在任期间阵亡的美国人员表示敬意，特别提到了在‘史诗之怒’行动中牺牲的14人。“我还想对我担任主席期间去世的39名联合部队成员表示深切的感谢，其中包括在‘史诗之怒’行动中牺牲的14人。正如部长所说，我们对他们每一个人及其家人深表感激，他们的名字将永远不会被遗忘。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇬🇧 Two Jewish men have been seriously injured in a stabbing attack in Golders Green, North London. One victim was stabbed outside shops on Golders Green Road, the other outside a synagogue on a side road. British Prime Minister Keir Starmer called the…" ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇮🇷 The Islamic Rightists Movement (Harakat Ashab al‑Yamin al‑Islamia, HAYI) has claimed responsibility for today’s stabbing attack in Golders Green, London, which left two Jewish men seriously injured. HAYI, an Iran‑linked group, has previously claimed synagogue arsons in Liège, Rotterdam and London, a bomb near the US embassy in Oslo, and a foiled Bank of America plot in Paris. European officials suspect the group may be a front created by Iranian intelligence to obscure direct involvement. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇬🇧 两名犹太男子在伦敦北部戈尔德斯格林（Golders Green）的持刀袭击中受重伤。一名受害者在戈尔德斯格林路（Golders Green Road）的商店外被刺伤，另一名在侧街的一座犹太教堂外被刺伤。英国首相基尔·斯塔默（Keir Starmer）称……” ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇮🇷 伊斯兰右翼运动（Harakat Ashab al‑Yamin al‑Islamia, HAYI）宣布对今天发生在伦敦戈尔德斯格林的持刀袭击事件负责，该事件导致两名犹太男子受重伤。HAYI是一个与伊朗有关联的组织，此前曾声称对列日、鹿特丹和伦敦的犹太教堂纵火案、奥斯陆美国大使馆附近的炸弹袭击以及巴黎一起未遂的美国银行阴谋负责。欧洲官员怀疑该组织可能是伊朗情报部门建立的幌子，旨在掩盖其直接参与。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷U.S. Secretary of War Hegseth fingered, what he described as, defeatist words of Congressional Democrats regarding the conflict with Iran as the biggest challenge the Department of War has faced. "The biggest challenge, the biggest adversary we face…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Secretary of War Hegseth compared previous U.S. wars and with the ongoing Operation Epic Fury. "I remind you, two months in to a conflict, lest I remind you, and my generation understands how long we were in Iraq, how long we were in Afghanistan, how long we were in Vietnam. Two months in on an existential fight for the safety of the American people, Iran cannot have a nuclear bomb." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷美国战争部长赫格塞斯指责国会民主党人关于与伊朗冲突的言论是失败主义的，称这是战争部面临的最大挑战。‘我们面临的最大挑战，最大的对手……’” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国战争部长赫格塞斯将之前的美国战争与正在进行的‘史诗之怒’行动进行了比较。“我提醒你们，冲突才两个月，我提醒你们，我这一代人了解我们在伊拉克待了多久，在阿富汗待了多久，在越南待了多久。在关乎美国人民安全的生存斗争中，才两个月，伊朗绝不能拥有核弹。” @wfwitness

text: WATCH: Rep. Pat Ryan confronts Pete Hegseth over the Iranian attack that killed six U.S. service members in the Port Shuaiba drone attack on March 1. Ryan details failures in U.S. defenses in the area, citing survivor testimony. Hegseth: Are you just going to monologue falsehoods all over the place?
text_zh: 观看：众议员帕特·瑞安（Pat Ryan）就3月1日舒艾拜港（Port Shuaiba）无人机袭击导致六名美军士兵死亡一事质问皮特·赫格塞斯（Pete Hegseth）。瑞安援引幸存者证词，详细说明了美国在该地区防御方面的失败。赫格塞斯：你难道只是想到处发表虚假的独白吗？

text: ⚡️ 🇷🇺 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Russian President Putin and U.S. President Trump held a phone call lasting over an hour and a half, Russian Presidential aide Yuri Ushakov said. Putin expressed support following the 25 April assassination attempt on Trump and condemned all forms of politically motivated violence. Putin welcomed Trump’s decision to extend the ceasefire with Iran, giving negotiations a chance, but warned that a return to force – especially a ground operation – would have catastrophic consequences for Iran, its neighbours and the international community. Russia reaffirmed its readiness to facilitate diplomacy on Iran’s nuclear programme. On Ukraine, Putin said Russian forces hold the strategic initiative, accused Kyiv of "terrorist" methods, and confirmed that the goals of the special military operation will be achieved. Putin informed Trump of Russia’s readiness to declare a ceasefire for Victory Day; Trump actively supported the initiative. The two also discussed economic and energy cooperation and agreed to maintain contacts. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇷🇺 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 俄罗斯总统普京与美国总统特朗普进行了超过一个半小时的通话，俄罗斯总统助理尤里·乌沙科夫（Yuri Ushakov）表示。普京对4月25日针对特朗普的暗杀企图表示支持，并谴责一切形式的政治暴力。普京对特朗普决定延长与伊朗的停火协议表示欢迎，认为这给了谈判机会，但警告称，恢复武力——特别是地面行动——将对伊朗、其邻国和国际社会造成灾难性后果。俄罗斯重申愿意促进有关伊朗核计划的外交。关于乌克兰，普京表示俄军掌握战略主动权，指责基辅采取“恐怖”手段，并确认特别军事行动的目标将会实现。普京告知特朗普俄罗斯准备为胜利日宣布停火；特朗普积极支持这一倡议。双方还讨论了经济和能源合作，并同意保持联系。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness" Intercepted
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区响起无人机警报。@wfwitness” 已拦截

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 American regime treat the Minab massacre like a budget expense KHANNA: How much did it cost American taxpayers, in terms of the strike on the Iranian school where kids were killed, in terms of the missiles we used? HEGSETH: That unfortunate situation remains under investigation. I wouldn’t tie a cost to that. They bombed a girls’ elementary school in broad daylight, slaughtering innocent children, and the only question that matters to them is the price of the missiles. Utterly inhuman! 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 美国政权把米纳布（Minab）大屠杀当作预算开支。卡纳（KHANNA）：就伊朗学校遇袭导致儿童死亡以及我们使用的导弹而言，这让美国纳税人付出了多少代价？赫格塞斯（HEGSETH）：那个不幸的情况仍在调查中。我不会将其与成本挂钩。他们在大白天轰炸了一所女子小学，屠杀了无辜的孩子，而对他们来说唯一重要的问题竟然是导弹的价格。极其不人道！🚩 ResistanceTrench | 推广

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷U.S. Secretary of War Hegseth testifies that U.S. President Trump has the courage to ensure that Iran doesn't build a nuclear weapon "I'm sure will come up today, which I very much welcome discussing. I look forward to sharing the incredible successes…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Secretary of War Hegseth fingered, what he described as, defeatist words of Congressional Democrats regarding the conflict with Iran as the biggest challenge the Department of War has faced. "The biggest challenge, the biggest adversary we face at this point are the reckless, feckless, and defeatist words of congressional Democrats and some Republicans two months in." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷美国战争部长赫格塞斯作证称，美国总统特朗普有勇气确保伊朗不会制造核武器‘我相信今天会提到这一点，我非常欢迎讨论。我期待分享令人难以置信的成功……’” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国战争部长赫格塞斯指责国会民主党人关于与伊朗冲突的言论是失败主义的，称这是战争部面临的最大挑战。“我们目前面临的最大挑战，最大的对手，是国会民主党人和一些共和党人在两个月后发表的鲁莽、无能和失败主义的言论。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 An Israeli airstrike the town of Nabatieh Al-Fawqa. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 以色列对纳巴泰（Nabatieh Al-Fawqa）镇发动空袭。@wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区响起无人机警报。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸U.S. Secretary of War Hegseth described the transformation of the Pentagon to meet the threats of tomorrow as undeniable. "Anyone on the outside looking in at what's been done inside this Pentagon in the last twelve months cannot deny the fundamental…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Secretary of War Hegseth testifies that U.S. President Trump has the courage to ensure that Iran doesn't build a nuclear weapon "I'm sure will come up today, which I very much welcome discussing. I look forward to sharing the incredible successes of our military achieved in a matter of weeks. President Trump, unlike other president, has had the courage to ensure Iran never gets a nuclear weapon, and he's ironclad in that." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸美国战争部长赫格塞斯称，五角大楼为应对未来威胁而进行的转型是不可否认的。‘任何从外部观察过去十二个月内五角大楼所作所为的人，都无法否认其根本性的……’ ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国战争部长赫格塞斯作证称，美国总统特朗普有勇气确保伊朗不会制造核武器。‘我相信今天会谈到这一点，我非常欢迎进行讨论。我期待分享我们的军队在几周内取得的惊人成功。特朗普总统与其他总统不同，他有勇气确保伊朗永远无法获得核武器，而且他在这方面立场坚定。’” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Iran’s Justice Minister Amin Rahimi said the Supreme National Security Council ultimately makes decisions regarding war and negotiations, based on the country’s interests, with final approval from the Supreme Leader. “There is a unified and coherent approach in the country in these areas,” he stated. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 伊朗司法部长阿明·拉希米表示，最高国家安全委员会最终根据国家利益决定战争与谈判事宜，并由最高领袖最终批准。他指出：“国家在这些领域有着统一且连贯的方法。” @wfwitness

text: WarMonitor RT @atrupar : MOULTON: Did you consider the risk of Iran closing the strait? HEGSETH: Of course MOULTON: So then why did you send the only minesweepers we had in the Gulf to Singapore weeks before the war started? https://twitter.com/atrupar/status/2049519120442437639/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 转推 @atrupar：莫尔顿：你考虑过伊朗封锁海峡的风险吗？赫格塞斯：当然。莫尔顿：那么为什么你在战争开始前几周，就把我们在海湾地区仅有的扫雷舰派往了新加坡？ https://twitter.com/atrupar/status/2049519120442437639/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Kremlin: Trump and Putin expressed similar assessments of the behavior of the government led by Volodymyr Zelensky, which they said is prolonging the conflict. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 克里姆林宫：特朗普和普京对泽连斯基领导的政府的行为表达了相似的评估，称其正在延长冲突。推文

text: WarMonitor Hegseth can’t keep the story straight because the facts don’t line up with what the president is saying. HEGSETH: Their nuclear facilities have been obliterated SMITH: Whoa whoa whoa whoa. We had to start this war, you just said, because the nuclear weapon was an imminent threat. Now you're saying it was completely obliterated? HEGSETH: They had not given up their *ambitions* SMITH: So Operation Midnight Hammer accomplished nothing of substance HEGSETH: You're missing the point - Aaron Rupar tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 赫格塞斯无法自圆其说，因为事实与总统的说法不符。赫格塞斯：他们的核设施已被摧毁。史密斯：等等，等等。你刚才说我们必须发动这场战争，因为核武器是迫在眉睫的威胁。现在你又说它被彻底摧毁了？赫格塞斯：他们并没有放弃他们的*野心*。史密斯：所以“午夜之锤”行动什么实质性成果都没有取得。赫格塞斯：你没抓住重点 - Aaron Rupar 推文

text: Open Source Intel Kremlin: Trump told Putin that a deal to resolve the conflict in Ukraine is already close. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 克里姆林宫：特朗普告诉普京，解决乌克兰冲突的协议已经接近达成。推文

text: Open Source Intel Putin to Trump: He foresees "extremely damaging consequences" if the U.S. and Israel resort to military action again in the Middle East. - Kremlin Kremlin: Putin held a phone call with Trump that lasted more than 1.5 hours. Putin told Trump he is ready to declare a ceasefire during the Victory Day period, and Trump supported it. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049543681523302438/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 普京对特朗普：他预见如果美国和以色列再次在中东采取军事行动，将产生“极其严重的后果”。- 克里姆林宫 克里姆林宫：普京与特朗普进行了超过1.5小时的通话。普京告诉特朗普，他准备在胜利日期间宣布停火，特朗普对此表示支持。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049543681523302438/photo/1 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: OSINTdefender During today’s phone call, Russian President Vladimir Putin welcomed President Trump’s decision to extend the ceasefire with Iran, while warning of “extremely harmful consequences” if Israel and the United States resumed strikes against the Islamic Republic, according to the Russian state-run news agency TASS. U.S. President Donald J. Trump spoke with Russia’s Vladimir Putin in a roughly one and a half hour long phone call this morning, according to the Kremlin, with discussions focusing around Iran and the ongoing situation in the Middle East. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2049542288674549875/photo/1 - OSINTdefender tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据俄罗斯塔斯社报道，在今天的通话中，俄罗斯总统普京对特朗普总统延长与伊朗停火的决定表示欢迎，同时警告称，如果以色列和美国恢复对伊朗伊斯兰共和国的打击，将产生“极其有害的后果”。据克里姆林宫称，美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普今天上午与俄罗斯总统普京进行了约一个半小时的通话，讨论重点围绕伊朗和中东局势。 https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2049542288674549875/photo/1 - OSINTdefender 推文

text: Open Source Intel Kremlin: Putin held a phone call with Trump that lasted more than 1.5 hours. Putin told Trump he is ready to declare a ceasefire during the Victory Day period, and Trump supported it. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049543681523302438/photo/1 tweet

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇦 Zelensky said that Ukraine provided assistance to several countries upon request, not limited to the Middle East. 📌 He noted that certain U.S. institutions also asked for support, and as partners, Ukraine agreed — including assistance related to American bases. 📌 He added that Ukraine believes it did help the United States, even if Washington does not acknowledge making such requests. Video is generated by Grok AI tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231：🇺🇦 泽连斯基表示，乌克兰应请求向多个国家提供了援助，不仅限于中东。📌 他指出，一些美国机构也请求了支持，作为合作伙伴，乌克兰同意了——包括与美国基地相关的援助。📌 他补充说，乌克兰认为确实帮助了美国，即使华盛顿不承认曾提出此类请求。视频由Grok AI生成 推文

U.S. pledges $100m to repair Chernobyl’s ‘cracked’ shield after drone strike damage State Department warns of ‘specter of radioactive leak’ in Europe as it calls on G7 allies to help fund $500m emergency restoration of nuclear containment arch https://twitter.com/ralakbar/status/2049483910099124482/photo/1 tweet
